name: Spiced Carrot & Orange Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Reserve 1 lb of the carrots for later use.
2. Heat oil in a large soup pot and sauté onions and celery until golden brown.
3. Add all ingredients except the reserved carrots, water, orange juice, wine, and spices to the pot.
4. Pour in water, orange juice, white wine, and add the spices (cumin, coriander, ginger, nutmeg).
5. Bring the mixture to a boil, cover, and simmer over moderate heat until the vegetables are tender.
6. Puree the soup until smooth.
7. Return the pot to low heat and stir in enough soymilk to achieve a medium-thick consistency.
8. Season with salt and pepper to taste and let stand for several hours before serving.
9. Just before serving, steam the reserved carrots until they are tender-crisp.
10. Stir the cooked, steamed carrots into the soup along with parsley and scallions.
11. Serve hot.
